message:
fix(tui): remove dead tone_for_status from tokens, fix PIN badge label

Remove tokens::tone_for_status() which was dead code (shadowed by the
free function at line 13878) and had contradictory mappings (e.g., open
mapped to Success in tokens but Accent in the free function).  The free
function is the canonical one used throughout scan line rendering.

Change status badge label for "pinned" from the confusing "PIND" to
"PIN " (trailing space) matching the Go bv convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
